Program_Info.Program_Install_Support: Uninstall support via built-in Mac app removal

English.Keywords: excel shortcuts, mac excel, windows to mac, keyboard shortcuts, excel for mac, mac migration, productivity, spreadsheet shortcuts
English.Char_Desc_45: Bring your Excel shortcuts to Mac
English.Char_Desc_80: Replicate familiar Windows Excel keyboard shortcuts natively on your MacBook
English.Char_Desc_250: Mac Excel Shortcuts (mes) helps Windows users migrating to Mac keep their muscle-memory Excel keyboard shortcuts working exactly as expected, without retraining. Lightweight menu bar app with dock/login/theme settings.
English.Char_Desc_450: Mac Excel Shortcuts (mes) is a lightweight menu bar utility built for Windows users migrating to Mac. It replicates the Excel keyboard shortcuts you already know by muscle memory, so switching platforms doesn't mean relearning your workflow. Configure dock, menu bar, login, and theme behavior to fit how you work. Start with a free 7-day trial, then unlock full access for a one-time $49 payment or $4.99/month.
English.Char_Desc_2000:
Mac Excel Shortcuts (mes) helps Windows users switching to Mac keep the Excel keyboard shortcuts they've relied on for years, without retraining their hands. Windows and Mac use different modifier keys and shortcut layouts for common Excel actions like navigation, formatting, cell insertion, and paste special -- small differences that add friction to an otherwise smooth transition. mes runs quietly in the menu bar and remaps these shortcuts to work natively on macOS, so familiar keystrokes just work.
Key features: - Faithful replication of common Windows Excel keyboard shortcuts on Mac - Lightweight menu bar app with minimal system overhead - Configurable dock, menu bar, and login-item behavior - Light and dark theme support - Automatic updates
mes is built for anyone moving from a Windows machine to a MacBook who doesn't want to lose years of Excel keyboard efficiency in the switch -- individuals, students, and enterprise teams undergoing Mac migrations alike.
Pricing: Free 7-day trial, then a one-time payment of $49 or $4.99/month.
English.Char_Desc_2000_html:
Mac Excel Shortcuts (mes) helps Windows users switching to Mac keep the Excel keyboard shortcuts they've relied on for years, without retraining their hands. Windows and Mac use different modifier keys and shortcut layouts for common Excel actions like navigation, formatting, cell insertion, and paste special — small differences that add friction to an otherwise smooth transition. mes runs quietly in the menu bar and remaps these shortcuts to work natively on macOS, so familiar keystrokes just work.

Key features:

  • Faithful replication of common Windows Excel keyboard shortcuts on Mac
  • Lightweight menu bar app with minimal system overhead
  • Configurable dock, menu bar, and login-item behavior
  • Light and dark theme support
  • Automatic updates

mes is built for anyone moving from a Windows machine to a MacBook who doesn't want to lose years of Excel keyboard efficiency in the switch — individuals, students, and enterprise teams undergoing Mac migrations alike.

Pricing: Free 7-day trial, then a one-time payment of $49 or $4.99/month.
